narrative.description: One of the earliest Japanese 3D platformers, Ninpen Manmaru sends a ninja penguin through polygonal stages with basic hub navigation and collect-a-thon goals ahead of its contemporaries.
narrative.core_loop: Clear linear 3D stages, collect scattered objectives, and unlock subsequent worlds from a simple hub.

mechanics.map_notes: Early analog 3D movement with fixed camera angles per stage section.
mechanics.expression: Early analog 3D movement with fixed camera angles per stage section.

mechanics.map_notes: Collectibles gate stage completion and hub progression.
mechanics.expression: Collectibles gate stage completion and hub progression.

mechanics.map_notes: Central hub connects to individual 3D courses.
mechanics.expression: Central hub connects to individual 3D courses.

mechanics.map_notes: Jump arcs require careful analog input on narrow ledges.
mechanics.expression: Jump arcs require careful analog input on narrow ledges.

mechanics.map_notes: Limited lives restart the current stage.
mechanics.expression: Limited lives restart the current stage.

mechanics.map_notes: Pits and enemy contact punish misjudged jumps.
mechanics.expression: Pits and enemy contact punish misjudged jumps.

mechanics.map_notes: Stage boundaries checkpoint progress between attempts.
mechanics.expression: Stage boundaries checkpoint progress between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: Basic attack clears fodder enemies blocking paths.
mechanics.expression: Basic attack clears fodder enemies blocking paths.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden collectibles reward thorough stage exploration.
mechanics.expression: Hidden collectibles reward thorough stage exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss clears unlock the next hub portal.
mechanics.expression: Boss clears unlock the next hub portal.

mechanics.map_notes: End-stage bosses follow simple repeating patterns.
mechanics.expression: End-stage bosses follow simple repeating patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on enemy hits and falls.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on enemy hits and falls.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Ninpen Manmaru through its core platformer loop.
